summary: Completed comprehensive frontend UI testing for Aashwashan mental health website. All requested features are implemented correctly including header branding, section ordering, therapist names, testimonials with Indian names and icons, contact info, self-help tools with modals, and About page pledge content.

header_branding.details: Aashwashan logo with 'Mental Health for All' tagline visible in navbar

homepage_section_order.details: Correct order: How Life Feels > Booking > Experts > Ignoring Signs > How We Support > How It Works > Why Aashwashan > Self-Help Tools > Testimonials > FAQ

therapist_names.details: Prakhar Tiwari, Sonali Mishra, Shweta Bramhankar all visible with Book Session buttons

testimonial_names.details: Priya Sharma, Rahul & Neha Gupta, Amit Verma with icons (user, users, heart) instead of images

contact_info.details: Address: 1289/6 Near Market Committee, Ambala City. Email: care@aashwashan.com

self_help_tools.details: 4-4-4 Breathing modal with Start Exercise button, Gratitude Journal modal with 3 input fields, Move Your Body exercise tip

booking_modal.details: Book Session button opens modal with 'It is Anonymous' badge, all form fields present

symptom_modal.details: 'How do I know I am going through this?' opens modal with symptoms list and Book a Session button

about_page.details: Pledge content visible: 'Changing How India Sees Mental Health', goal to decrease suicide rates

whatsapp_button.details: WhatsApp floating button visible on bottom right

context_for_next_testing_agent: All UI features tested and working. Content data is MOCKED in mockData.js. Backend APIs for appointments/contact/feedback are functional but not tested in this iteration. Self-help tools (breathing exercise, gratitude journal) work client-side only.

mocked_apis_list: mockData.js for services, team, testimonials, faqs - all content is static/mocked
